import re

with open\('/C/Users/rcdga/mantto-compras-almacen/ManttoGS.js', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find the block to replace using a pattern that avoids unicode issues
old_block = re.search\(
    r'      else if \\\(nuevo === "CERRADA"\\\) \\{.*?        sheet\\.getRange\\\(fila, 18\\\)\\.setValue\\\("CERRADA"\\\);\\n      \\}',
    content, re.DOTALL
\)
if old_block:
    print\("FOUND at:", old_block.start\(\), old_block.end\(\)\)
    print\("---"\)
    print\(repr\(old_block.group\(\)[:200]\)\)
else:
    print\("NOT FOUND"\)
PYEOF)
